$comment: Layer D for REBATE: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A (file I/O stage 2b). Every non-filler field of the record reads the record's single logical input position (unioned over iterations, symmetric with the modern side's single in-loop read); REBATE derives from R-AMOUNT (the record input) and the rate/rounding, QUAL and RECS from the constant 1.
